case_title: MINOT HILL EVERIE DBA HOUSE OF ANGEL RESTAURANT VS JOHNSON ERNIE PARTNER IND ROLANDS NIGHT CLUB et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO JOHN BLACKSHEAR (ROLAND'S NITE CLUB) SHOWS ILLEGIBLE LAST NAME.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MINOT HILL EVERIE DBA HOUSE OF ANGEL RESTAURANT AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON ERNIE PARTNER IND ROLANDS NIGHT CLUB JOHNSON ELIZABETH A PARTNER IND ROLANDS NIGHT CLUB BLACKSHEAR JOHN PARTNER IND ROLANDS NIGHT CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO ELIZABETH JOHNSON RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINOT HILL EVERIE DBA HOUSE OF ANGEL RESTAURANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON ERNIE PARTNER IND ROLANDS NIGHT CLUB JOHNSON ELIZABETH A PARTNER IND ROLANDS NIGHT CLUB $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $18.37 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,018.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
